# Gates Enterprises LLC

## Colorado's Most Certified Roofing Contractor

> Gates Enterprises LLC is a full-service roofing and exterior contractor based in Lakewood, Colorado, serving the entire Front Range since 2014.

## Certifications (Quadruple Manufacturer Certified)

- GAF Master Elite (Top 2% of contractors nationally)
- Owens Corning Platinum Preferred
- Malarkey Emerald Pro
- CertainTeed Shingle Master

## Key Facts

- In business since 2014
- 7,200+ roofs completed
- 4.8 star rating, 300+ Google reviews
- Up to 50 year manufacturer warranty
- 7 year workmanship warranty
- Locally owned and operated in Lakewood, CO

## Services

- Roof Replacement
- Roof Repair
- Storm Damage & Hail Repair
- Gutters & Gutter Guards
- Commercial Roofing
- Insurance Claims Restoration
- Siding Installation
- Window Replacement
- Exterior Painting

## Service Area

Denver metro and Front Range — 25+ cities including:
Denver, Lakewood, Arvada, Westminster, Thornton, Broomfield, Brighton, Northglenn, Federal Heights, Commerce City, Aurora, Wheat Ridge, Littleton, Englewood, Golden, Morrison, Evergreen, Parker, Castle Rock, Highlands Ranch, Centennial, Lone Tree, Superior, Conifer, Edgewater
